options: Real news in a different language
False stories that appear to be news, spread on the internet

questions.enonce: Critical thinking is important to distinguish fact from opinion.
Spreading false information unintentionally is called {{1}} (not malice).

pairs.right: Prejudice in favor of or against one thing
The place or person where information originates

questions.enonce: What is 'echo chamber' in social media ?
options: An environment where a person only encounters information that reflects and reinforces their own beliefs
